h48577497gd530g4cf3g9a0agca7fb6f5e450: These druids have a child's death on their hands... let's find that healer before any vipers decide to bare their fangs at us.
h81035637g46d0g49ebgba34g354840f54aa8: I'm not dealing with child-killers, even if they do have a healer.
h61e41c7agbabbg44cdgbc86g5e8f5ebd7a5d: Principles won't save us. Not this time. Just... bite your tongue, for now.
h97820e55gb731g4d21ga969ge213b0d23b8c: I'm not dealing with child-killers. Doesn't matter if they can help us or not.
h147c2a41g1b77g46a9gb35agdf188ca07c55: We could've stopped this but you held back. The child's death is on you as well.
h05b65d73g0834g49d4ga83cgd939bfc73812: I didn't know that was going to happen. Don't pretend picking a fight would've saved that little girl.
h681c54d6g5871g4a04g9744g891caf7f1ff2: I'm surprised you care. That little girl was nobody to you.
h618b0c1cg15dfg4326g94b5g2848146e8651: Do you truly think I'm that callous? A young life snuffed out isn't easily shrugged off.
hb12bfeaagab56g44fdga150g16a6349f918f: She tried to steal something precious to the druids - and paid the price.
hfeddd024ga270g43aaga668g5e7308b4caa6: Quite a price. Let's behave ourselves around here - or at least let's not get caught.
h5b7cadb0gf39dg4ceega647gcf122dea26d3: We should have done something. Maybe we could have saved her.
h883e659agedadg40deg82bag93ba71b57670: Maybe. Or maybe she'd still be dead, and we'd be left fighting this lot.
hc8eb0375g5bb3g4485gb85age566d286a2fe: We... can't help everyone. Even if we want to.
h379b2d76gfb12g4851g845bgb2998b4a7581: I should have just attacked while I had the chance.
h45cd6ab6gd39ag458fgb29fg3416fbcbbc75: Then we'd have had a fight on our hands, and no hope of assistance from these druids.
h9c9ef589g432cg41b8g80a4g6ca8bcf03740: What will her parents say? We told them we'd help.
h9788f3f4gbad4g4ac0g9daegba50efe40bfd: 'We'? I said we shouldn't get involved.
h48e97518ga03bg4506gb6d2g0694acd3cf4a: They killed a child, for that...? Let's get in and out of this place before any vipers decide to bare their fangs at us.
